segments.speaker: 题目23/24
segments.text: Listen to an announcement in a classroom. Hello, a couple of announcements. 1st, our scheduled studio time for this week will unfortunately have to be postponed. The space is undergoing unexpected maintenance and won't be available until next Wednesday. You can borrow supplies for me, though, and work on your projects at home or in the library art room. Better news is that we'll have a guest speaker this Friday, local artist Maya Lin, nn, who will talk about her creative process and answer questions sheshow some of her work too.
